global.description: The ad features a prominent logo, app previews, and a clear call to action.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'FreshDash' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: App interface preview
elements.description: A rectangular preview of the app interface showing three empty boxes, suggesting a selection or menu.

elements.label: App interface preview
elements.description: Another rectangular preview of the app interface with three empty boxes, similar to the previous element.

elements.label: App interface preview
elements.description: A third rectangular preview of the app interface displaying three empty boxes, consistent with the other previews.

elements.label: Late-night deals text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Late-night deals available' in a clear, readable font, positioned centrally below the app previews.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Book now' in a contrasting color, designed to attract attention and encourage interaction.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Text that reads 'We got you' in a friendly, inviting font, placed just above the call to action button.

elements.label: Background color
elements.description: A warm, solid background color that fills the lower portion of the ad, creating a welcoming atmosphere.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Late ble Book now

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A small logo featuring the text 'FreshDash' in a bold font, located at the top left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, app previews are centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
